prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.8L 30V ABC (AAH) V6 from the Audi S4/RS2 Avant, retaining the original 5-speed manual transmission (01E) but upgrading the clutch to a Sachs Performance Twin-Disc (Part # 3000 950 601) for 500 Nm torque capacity, paired with a lightweight aluminum flywheel (Part # 3000 950 602).

Forced induction via a Rotrex C30-94 supercharger kit (Part # C30-94-000) with a custom-mapped Bosch Motronic ME7.1 ECU (from the B5 S4) using APR Stage 3+ software (Part # ME7-1-30V-003), targeting 350 HP at 6,500 RPM and 420 Nm at 4,000 RPM with 10 psi boost, cooled by a PWR Australia front-mount intercooler (Part # PWI-1000).

Suspension overhaul with KW Variant 3 coilovers (Part # 35231001) specifically valved for the Cabriolet’s B3/B4 platform, featuring adjustable rebound and compression damping, paired with H&R 24mm front and 22mm rear anti-roll bars (Part # 546 560 01 & 546 560 02) and polyurethane subframe bushings from 034 Motorsport (Part # 034-011-050).
estetica: Full OEM+ widebody conversion using genuine Audi 80/90 (B3/B4) Quattro Sport fender flares (Part # 893 807 217 A & 893 807 218 A) reinforced with carbon fiber inner liners from Seibon (Part # CF-AU-91F & CF-AU-91R), finished in Nardo Gray (L94A) with matte black accents.

Custom hardtop conversion using a one-piece aluminum hardtop from Cabriolet Hardtops UK (Part # AUDI-CAB-89-91-ALU), powder-coated in Anthracite (LY7X) and fitted with a rear spoiler from the Audi 90 Quattro IMSA GTO (Part # 893 807 219), mounted via custom 034 Motorsport billet aluminum brackets (Part # 034-101-050).

Wheel setup with BBS RS-GT II 17x9 ET25 (front) and 17x10 ET20 (rear) in Gold (Part # 4011710001 & 4011710002), wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear), paired with StopTech Big Brake Kit (Part # 120.40110) featuring 355mm two-piece rotors and 6-piston calipers in gloss black.
